prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is X-102 Fall protection within 2.12 Safety & Rigging. The relevant subcategory is 2.10.4 Quality Inspection. The observed field condition is: 6-ft trigger ignored. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors OSHA 1926 Subpart M, 1910.140. The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 X-102 Measurement & estimation
